case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO VS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF MUNI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF MUNI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
REM: ADVANCED AND HEARD ON 12-16-96 @ 5:30PM. WITH CASE # 761508, PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC CO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF MUNI ADVANCED AND HEARD ON 12/16/96 AT 5:30 PM WITH CASE #761508, PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
